prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis of acrolein (8 atoms: O, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) computed at DFT tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF RKS, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied acrolein.xyz, not relaxed (single-point Fukui). Mulliken finite-difference scheme; N−1 cation (charge +1, mult 2) and N+1 anion (charge −1, mult 2) evaluated at the same level.

Headline result (most electrophilic site): C-4 (terminal vinyl carbon, atom index 4), f⁺ = 0.64232102.
Most nucleophilic site: O-1 (carbonyl oxygen, atom index 1), f⁻ = 0.39388616.

Full per-atom Fukui indices (f⁺ / f⁻ / f⁰ / Δf):
  O  (1): 0.40136 / 0.39389 / 0.39763 /  0.00748
  C  (2): 0.02226 / 0.00599 / 0.01412 /  0.01627
  C  (3): 0.43405 / 0.09140 / 0.26272 /  0.34264
  C  (4): 0.64232 / 0.08737 / 0.36485 /  0.55495
  H  (5):-0.15726 / 0.08596 /-0.03565 / -0.24323
  H  (6):-0.20720 / 0.18568 /-0.01076 / -0.39288
  H  (7):-0.06212 / 0.08449 / 0.01118 / -0.14660
  H  (8):-0.07341 / 0.06523 /-0.00409 / -0.13863

Charge conservation: sum(f⁺)=1.0000, sum(f⁻)=1.0000. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true. No warnings reported by the engine.
